* Compares two CharSequences, returning true if they represent equal sequences of characters. *

* *

* *

* *

* *

* Copied from Apache Commons Lang r1583482 on April 10, 2014 (day of 3.3.2 release). *

* * @see Object#equals(Object) * @param cs1 * the first CharSequence, may be null * @param cs2 * the second CharSequence, may be null * @return true if the CharSequences are equal (case-sensitive), or both null * @since 1.10 */ public static boolean equals(final CharSequence cs1, final CharSequence cs2) { if (cs1 == cs2) { return true
